// Package course demonstrates document ingestion behavior.
package course

import "fmt"

// Version describes one immutable document build.
type Version struct {
	ContentHash string
	Status      string
}

// Activate changes a verified ready version into the active version.
func (v *Version) Activate() error {
	if v.Status != "ready" {
		return fmt.Errorf("version status %q is not ready", v.Status)
	}
	v.Status = "active"
	return nil
}

// ChunkID returns the already validated stable chunk identity.
func ChunkID(value string) string {
	return value
}
